items.title: US national on repatriation flight tests positive for hantavirus
items.dek: Another one of 17 Americans flown home has mild symptoms, the US health department says.
items.body: Another one of 17 Americans flown home has mild symptoms, the US health department says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: BBC tours England and Argentina's World Cup training grounds
items.dek: Will Grant tested out one of the pitches where England captain Harry Kane and his team will train in Kansas City.

items.title: Modi urges Indians to work from home and limit foreign travel as Iran war continues
items.dek: He said the austerity measures would reduce India's fuel use and help save foreign exchange.
items.body: He said the austerity measures would reduce India's fuel use and help save foreign exchange.
